revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:4 nguŏk 17 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:4月17日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 4월 17일]][[zh-min-nan:4 goe̍h 17 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:四月十七]][[zh:四月十七]]
{{Not to be confused with|April 17|qq=April 17}} <!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=四月十七|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 4월 17일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar April|qq=}} '''April 17''' is the 17th day of the month {{ill|April (Lunisolar)|ja|4月 (旧暦)|lt=April|lt=April (Uzuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/April (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 4th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|qid=Q96759840|1=tomobiki}}{{efn|ja|友引|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}}. == Events == * {{ill|Yōrō|en|Yōrō|qid=Q1373061|lt=Yōrō|1=Yōrō}} 7th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|723|en|723|qid=Q23545|lt=723|1=723}} {{ill|May 25|en|May 25|qid=Q2585|lt=May 25|1=May 25}}) – {{ill|Sansē Isshinhō|ja|三世一身法|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sansē Isshinhō|1=Sansē Isshinhō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11354153}} issued. * {{ill|Tenpyō|en|Tenpyō|qid=Q1199879|lt=Tenpyō|1=Tenpyō}} 2nd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|730|en|730|qid=Q23563|lt=730|1=730}} {{ill|May 8|en|May 8|qid=Q2555|lt=May 8|1=May 8}}) – At the initiative of {{ill|Empress Kōmyō|en|Empress Kōmyō|qid=Q837932|lt=Kōmyō Empress|1=Empress Kōmyō}}, a {{ill|Shiyakuin|ja|施薬院|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shiyakuin|1=Seyaku-in|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11504417}} was established to treat impoverished patients. * {{ill|Keian|en|Keian|qid=Q1146135|lt=Keian|1=Keian}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1648|en|1648|qid=Q6941|lt=1648|1=1648}} {{ill|June 8|en|June 8|qid=Q2621|lt=June 8|1=June 8}}) – The planting of 200,000 trees along {{ill|Cedar Avenue of Nikkō|en|Cedar Avenue of Nikkō|qid=Q2873976|lt=Nikkō Suginamiki|1=Cedar Avenue of Nikkō}} was completed. * {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|qid=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era|1=Meiji era}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1868|en|1868|qid=Q7717|lt=1868|1=1868}} {{ill|June 7|en|June 7|qid=Q2616|lt=June 7|1=June 7}}) – ({{ill|Intercalary month|ja|閏月|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Intercalary month|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=Intercalary month|qid=Q2667252}} {{ill|April|en|April|qid=Q118|lt=April|1=April}}) The Meiji government exiled the Christians discovered in Nagasaki and Urakami, drawing condemnation from Western nations ({{ill|Urakami Yoban Kuzure|en|Urakami Yoban Kuzure|qid=Q7899579|lt=Urakami Shihan Kuzure|1=Urakami Yoban Kuzure}}). == Births == * {{ill|Tenpō|en|Tenpō|qid=Q1369045|lt=Tenpō|1=Tenpō}} 8th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1837|en|1837|qid=Q7608|lt=1837|1=1837}} {{ill|May 21|en|May 21|qid=Q2580|lt=May 21|1=May 21}}) – {{ill|Itagaki Taisuke|en|Itagaki Taisuke|qid=Q456380|lt=Itagaki Taisuke|1=Itagaki Taisuke}}, a {{ill|Politician|en|Politician|qid=Q82955|lt=politician|1=Politician}} and leader of the {{ill|Freedom and People's Rights Movement|en|Freedom and People's Rights Movement|qid=Q711511|lt=Freedom and People's Rights Movement|1=Freedom and People's Rights Movement}} (died {{ill|1919|en|1919|qid=Q2157|lt=1919|1=1919}}). * {{ill|Kaei|en|Kaei|qid=Q1146125|lt=Kaei|1=Kaei}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1849|en|1849|qid=Q7650|lt=1849|1=1849}} {{ill|May 9|en|May 9|qid=Q2556|lt=May 9|1=May 9}}) – {{ill|Empress Shōken|en|Empress Shōken|qid=Q269520|lt=Empress Shōken|1=Empress Shōken}}, consort of {{ill|Emperor Meiji|en|Emperor Meiji|qid=Q174231|lt=Emperor Meiji|1=Emperor Meiji}} (died {{ill|1914|en|1914|qid=Q2083|lt=1914|1=1914}}). == Deaths == * ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|269|en|269|qid=Q32719|lt=269|1=269}} {{ill|June 3|en|June 3|qid=Q2623|lt=June 3|1=June 3}}) – {{ill|Empress Jingū|en|Empress Jingū|qid=Q232803|lt=Empress Jingu|1=Empress Jingū}}, consort of {{ill|Emperor Chūai|en|Emperor Chūai|qid=Q179971|lt=Emperor Chūai|1=Emperor Chūai}} and mother of {{ill|Emperor Ōjin|en|Emperor Ōjin|qid=Q317997|lt=Emperor Ōjin|1=Emperor Ōjin}} (born {{ill|170|en|170|qid=Q31282|lt=170|1=170}}). * {{ill|Tenpyō|en|Tenpyō|qid=Q1199879|lt=Tenpyō|1=Tenpyō}} 9th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|737|en|737|qid=Q411351|lt=737|1=737}} {{ill|May 21|en|May 21|qid=Q2580|lt=May 21|1=May 21}}) – {{ill|Fujiwara no Fusasaki|en|Fujiwara no Fusasaki|qid=Q2173602|lt=Fujiwara Fusazai|1=Fujiwara no Fusasaki}}, a {{ill|Courtier|en|Courtier|qid=Q1511216|lt=courtier|1=Courtier}} and child of {{ill|Fujiwara no Fuhito|en|Fujiwara no Fuhito|qid=Q177517|lt=Fujiwara Fuhitō|1=Fujiwara no Fuhito}} (born {{ill|681|en|681|qid=Q30342|lt=681|1=681}}). * {{ill|Chōgen|en|Chōgen|qid=Q1193557|lt=Chōgen|1=Chōgen}} 9th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1036|en|1036|qid=Q19328|lt=1036|1=1036}} {{ill|May 15|en|May 15|qid=Q2562|lt=May 15|1=May 15}}) – {{ill|Emperor Go-Ichijō|en|Emperor Go-Ichijō|qid=Q374087|lt=Emperor Go-Ichijō|1=Emperor Go-Ichijō}}, the 68th {{ill|Emperor of Japan|en|Emperor of Japan|qid=Q208233|lt=Emperor of Japan|1=Emperor of Japan}} (died {{ill|1008|en|1008|qid=Q19235|lt=1008|1=1008}}). * {{ill|Bun'ei|en|Bun'ei|qid=Q1010103|lt=Bunna|1=Bun'ei}} 3rd year / {{ill|Zhengping|en|Zhengping|qid=Q11123413|lt=Shōhei|1=Zhengping}} 9th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1354|en|1354|qid=Q6118|lt=1354|1=1354}} {{ill|May 10|en|May 10|qid=Q2557|lt=May 10|1=May 10}}) – {{ill|Kitabatake Chikafusa|en|Kitabatake Chikafusa|qid=Q683792|lt=Kitabatake Chikafusa|1=Kitabatake Chikafusa}}, a {{ill|Kugyō|en|Kugyō|qid=Q3138036|lt=Kugyō|1=Kugyō}} and {{ill|Waka poet|ja|歌人|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Waka poet|qq=}} (died {{ill|1293|en|1293|qid=Q5557|lt=1293|1=1293}}). * {{ill|Yuanhe|en|Yuanhe|qid=Q10889567|lt=Genna|1=Yuanhe}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1616|en|1616|qid=Q6788|lt=1616|1=1616}} {{ill|June 1|en|June 1|qid=Q2625|lt=June 1|1=June 1}}) – {{ill|Tokugawa Ieyasu|en|Tokugawa Ieyasu|qid=Q171977|lt=Tokugawa Ieyasu|1=Tokugawa Ieyasu}}, the first {{ill|Shogun|en|Shogun|qid=Q131767|lt=Shōgun|1=Shogun}} of the {{ill|Tokugawa shogunate|1=Tokugawa shogunate|2=ja|3=江戸幕府|ja|徳川幕府|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokugawa shogunate|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 江戸幕府}} (died {{ill|1542|en|1542|qid=Q6520|lt=1542|1=1542}}). * {{ill|Tenna|ja|天和|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenna|1=Tenna (era)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11442381}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1682|en|1682|qid=Q7648|lt=1682|1=1682}} {{ill|May 24|en|May 24|qid=Q2584|lt=May 24|1=May 24}}) – {{ill|Zhu Zhiyu|en|Zhu Zhiyu|qid=Q11093536|lt=Shushunsui|1=Zhu Zhiyu}}, a {{ill|Ru (Confucian scholar)|ja|儒学者|zh|儒生|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ru (Confucian scholar)|qq=}} (died {{ill|1600|en|1600|qid=Q6720|lt=1600|1=1600}}). * {{ill|Culture|en|Culture|qid=Q11042|lt=Bunka|1=Culture}} 14th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1817|en|1817|qid=Q6958|lt=1817|1=1817}} {{ill|June 1|en|June 1|qid=Q2625|lt=June 1|1=June 1}}) – {{ill|Sugita Genpaku|en|Sugita Genpaku|qid=Q1385286|lt=Sugita Genpaku|1=Sugita Genpaku}}, a Dutch studies physician (died {{ill|1733|en|1733|qid=Q6972|lt=1733|1=1733}}). == Commemorations == {{Expand section|qq=}}
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|4|16|4|18|3|17|5|4|0417|qq=}} ==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}
[[zh-min-nan:4 goe̍h 17 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:四月十七]] {{translated page|ja|4月17日 (旧暦)|version=83711847|comment=Imported full ja history}}

[[ko:음력 4월 17일]] [[ja:4月17日 (旧暦)]] [[zh:四月十七]]
[[ar:April 17 (Lunisolar)]] <!--jawiki derived wikidata interwikis--> [[zh-min-nan:4 goe̍h 17 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:四月十七]] <!--zhwiki derived wikidata interwikis--> [[zh-min-nan:4 goe̍h 17 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:四月十七]]
